page.content: In the Asia-Pacific region, the Rental Rate Growth table reveals significant variations in logistics markets, with Mumbai showing a rental rate growth of 8.5%, a current year metric of 1.2, historical data at 0.9, and future projections of 5.5% and 7.0%. Delhi follows with a rental rate growth of 7.2%, current year metric of 1.1, historical data of 1.0, and future projections of 4.8% and 6.5%. Bangalore reports the highest growth at 9.0%, with a current year metric of 1.3, historical data of 0.8, and future projections at 6.0% and 8.2%.
